description: Composition Charcoal grey track pants made of 100% polyester, has a broad elasticated waistband with a drawstring on the inseam, two insert pockets on the sides, mesh panel on the inside, white panel on the sides, embroidered nike swoosh on the left leg and zipper and toggle straps at the hems Fitting Regular Wash care Gentle machine wash inside out with like colours using cold water Do not bleach, dry clean or use softeners Line dry Do not iron Soft on the inside and sporty on the outside, these track pants from nike make for a great addition to your casual wardrobe. Crafted from soft polyester, these pants are ideal for your Sports training, jogging sessions or just laid back weekends. The fabric keeps you dry and comfortable and the sporty look does wonders for your casual style. Pair it with a sporty T-shirt and running shoes. Product is a size M on a model of height 6' and waist 28"
